case_title: CAROL F BUCK VS. JOHN CHIANG

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-28-2008 CONTINUED TO SEP-29-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-28-2008 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-29-2008 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF BUCK, CAROL F

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST EWALD O. SCHLACHTER, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: SEP-29-2008, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-14-2008. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
